---
title: "Contact"
---

<div class="page">

# Contact

## Get in Touch

<div class="card">
  <h3>Email</h3>
  <p><a href="mailto:rodrigo.aguayo@vub.be">rodrigo.aguayo@vub.be</a></p>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <h3>Institutional Address</h3>
  <p>
    Vrije Universiteit Brussel<br>
    Department of Water and Climate (HYDR)<br>
    Pleinlaan 2, 1050 Brussels<br>
    Belgium
  </p>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <h3>Group</h3>
  <p><a href="https://hydr.vub.be/research-groups/bglacier">bglacier — Glaciology Research Group</a></p>
</div>

## Online

<div class="social-links">
  <a class="social-link" href="mailto:rodrigo.aguayo@vub.be">📧 Email</a>
  <a class="social-link" href="https://bsky.app/profile/rodaguayo.bsky.social">🔵 Bluesky</a>
  <a class="social-link" href="https://github.com/rodaguayo">🐙 GitHub</a>
  <a class="social-link" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=P_LBnTbIAy8C&hl=en">🎓 Google Scholar</a>
  <a class="social-link" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-2335-8470">🆔 ORCID</a>
  <a class="social-link" href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Rodrigo-Aguayo">📊 ResearchGate</a>
  <a class="social-link" href="https://hydr.vub.be/people/rodrigo.aguayo">🏛️ VUB Profile</a>
</div>

</div>
